metadata.description: Knowledge management and workflow automation plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: autoimprove-agents
plugins.description: Modular CLAUDE.md + project/cross-project KB + self-improvement loop for agents

plugins.name: zettelkasten-capture
plugins.description: Transform Claude session output into structured Obsidian Zettelkasten draft notes with excalidraw stubs

plugins.name: session-learner
plugins.description: Session memory persistence, git-aware context injection, compact suggestions, and take-away reflections

plugins.name: data-analysis
plugins.description: Structured data analysis using DuckDB and Six Thinking Hats with business-context playbooks and FACT/ASSUME methodology

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Iterative improvement loop with eval-driven keep/discard and live HTML dashboard, inspired by karpathy/autoresearch
